    S

    send(String) - Method in interface edu.desu.cis.robot.service.RobotService
    Sends a message (command) to the robot.
    send(String) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.TcpRobotService
    Sends a message to the connected robot.
    SensorCache - Class in edu.desu.cis.robot.service
    A thread-safe cache for storing and providing access to the robot's sensor data.
    SensorCache() - Constructor for class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorCache
    Constructs a new, empty SensorCache.
    SensorCache.BallData - Class in edu.desu.cis.robot.service
    A simple, immutable container for data about a detected ball.
    SensorSnapshot - Record Class in edu.desu.cis.robot.service
     
    SensorSnapshot(double, double, int) - Constructor for record class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorSnapshot
    Creates an instance of a SensorSnapshot record class.
    ServiceLocator - Class in edu.desu.cis.robot.core.services
    A simple service locator pattern implementation for registering and retrieving services.
    ServiceLocator() - Constructor for class edu.desu.cis.robot.core.services.ServiceLocator
     
    setData(JsonNode) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse.Payload
    Sets the data payload.
    setErrorCode(String) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse.Payload
    Sets the error code.
    setId(String) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse
    Sets the ID of the JSON response.
    setLeftMotorPower(double) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Set the left motor power.
    setMessage(String) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse.Payload
    Sets the message associated with the payload.
    setMotorPower(double, double) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Set the left and right motor power.
    setPayload(JsonResponse.Payload) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse
    Sets the payload of the JSON response.
    setRightMotorPower(double) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Set the right motor power.
    setStatus(String) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse.Payload
    Sets the status of the payload.
    setType(String) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonResponse
    Sets the type of the JSON response.
    showLed(String) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Displays a color pattern on the LEDs.
    stop() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Stops the robot's movement.
    stop() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.TelemetryListener
    Stops the telemetry listener and closes the underlying socket.
    stopAllBehaviors() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Stops all active behaviors on the robot.
    stopAtLine() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Commands the robot to stop when a line is detected.
    stopBehavior(String) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Stops a specific behavior on the robot.
    straight(double) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Moves the robot straight for a specified distance.
